action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 3 successfully trained all 10 tasks (5k steps each) and saved checkpoints to /workspace/ckpt/, but evaluation failed with FileNotFoundError when PPO.load tried to open the checkpoint. The error path (/experiments/../../../ckpt) suggests the eval container resolved the relative 'ckpt' path differently than /workspace/ckpt. Analysis: predict.py was too fragile—it blindly joined args.checkpoint with task_id without validating the directory or falling back to an absolute workspace path. Training length (5k steps) is also far too short for HumanoidBench, but the first priority is fixing the pipeline so eval can run at all. Decision: (1) Rewrite predict.py with robust checkpoint discovery (relative → script-dir relative → /workspace/ckpt fallback) and debug prints to stderr. (2) Create a minimal mock eval_config.json with 2 seeds per task to test predict.py locally. (3) Run local test. (4) Submit eval to confirm the pipeline is unblocked.
action.command: python predict.py --data_path /workspace/mock_data --checkpoint ckpt --output /workspace/test_output.json && echo '--- LOCAL TEST PASSED ---' && head -c 3000 /workspace/test_output.json
